messages.author: martynb85.
messages.text: Hi Anyone on here from around this location? Have one showing on Mesh Analyser in Burntwood park, would love to have a natter to the person that installed it. Anyway I should have a repeater going up in WS7 very soon. Also plan to get one somewhere in Chasewater if I can find a suitable location.
messages.content_html: Hi Anyone on here from around this location? Have one showing on Mesh Analyser in Burntwood park, would love to have a natter to the person that installed it. Anyway I should have a repeater going up in WS7 very soon. Also plan to get one somewhere in Chasewater if I can find a suitable location.
